news.title:
Power stocks like Adani Power, Tata Power, JP Power rise amid market crash, driven by peak summer demand & stable fuel availability.
Adani Power gained 3.7%, JP Power 3.4%, Tata Power 2.7%; Sensex, Nifty fell on geopolitical tensions & crude oil price surge.
news.summary:
Power stocks like Adani Power, Tata Power, JP Power rise amid market crash, driven by peak summer demand & stable fuel availability.
Adani Power gained 3.7%, JP Power 3.4%, Tata Power 2.7%; Sensex, Nifty fell on geopolitical tensions & crude oil price surge.

news.title:
Rajesh Palviya of Axis Securities recommends Hindalco, Cummins India, and Adani Power as buys for April 10, highlighting bullish trends.
Hindalco targets ₹1,030, Cummins India ₹5,350, and Adani Power ₹190, with strong support levels and technical indicators backing the outlook.
news.summary:
Rajesh Palviya of Axis Securities recommends Hindalco, Cummins India, and Adani Power as buys for April 10, highlighting bullish trends.
Hindalco targets ₹1,030, Cummins India ₹5,350, and Adani Power ₹190, with strong support levels and technical indicators backing the outlook.

news.title:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.
news.summary:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.

news.title: Adani Power to review Q4 financial results on April 29.
news.summary: Adani Power to review Q4 financial results on April 29.

news.title:
Adani Power Ltd's board to meet on April 29, 2026, for FY26 financial results.
Trading window closed from April 1, reopens 48 hrs post-results; investor call scheduled.
news.summary:
Adani Power Ltd's board to meet on April 29, 2026, for FY26 financial results.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Adani Power, Titan, Cummins India, Mankind Pharma, and Arvind Ltd. based on technical patterns and sectoral momentum.
Targets include Adani Power at Rs 170, Titan at Rs 4,180, Cummins India at Rs 4,820, Mankind Pharma at Rs 2,250, and Arvind Ltd. at Rs 430.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Adani Power, Titan, Cummins India, Mankind Pharma, and Arvind Ltd. based on technical patterns and sectoral momentum.
Targets include Adani Power at Rs 170, Titan at Rs 4,180, Cummins India at Rs 4,820, Mankind Pharma at Rs 2,250, and Arvind Ltd. at Rs 430.

news.title:
Titan, Adani Power, and GPIL are bullish picks; Titan targets Rs. 4,500, Adani Power Rs. 180, GPIL Rs. 298.
Titan shows a breakout; Adani Power confirms uptrend; GPIL breaks triangle, RSI above 60 for all stocks.
news.summary:
Titan, Adani Power, and GPIL are bullish picks; Titan targets Rs. 4,500, Adani Power Rs. 180, GPIL Rs. 298.
Titan shows a breakout; Adani Power confirms uptrend; GPIL breaks triangle, RSI above 60 for all stocks.

news.title:
Diamond Power secures Rs 163 cr orders from Adani group, including Rs 43.3 cr from Adani Power and Rs 100.5 cr from Adani Electricity.
The company saw Q3 FY26 net profit jump 693% to Rs 49.72 cr, driven by a 54.2% sales surge to Rs 474.08 cr.
news.summary:
Diamond Power secures Rs 163 cr orders from Adani group, including Rs 43.3 cr from Adani Power and Rs 100.5 cr from Adani Electricity.
The company saw Q3 FY26 net profit jump 693% to Rs 49.72 cr, driven by a 54.2% sales surge to Rs 474.08 cr.

news.title:
Adani Power secures 2,500 MW renewable energy contract from MSEDCL for 25 years.
The RE RTC deal ensures steady green energy supply, supporting Maharashtra's energy needs.
news.summary:
Adani Power secures 2,500 MW renewable energy contract from MSEDCL for 25 years.
The RE RTC deal ensures steady green energy supply, supporting Maharashtra's energy needs.

news.title: Adani Power secures 2,500 MW power supply contract for 25 years with Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution.
news.summary: Adani Power secures 2,500 MW power supply contract for 25 years with Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution.

news.title:
Adani Power saw an NSE block trade of 1,579,389 shares for Rs. 24.5 cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 155.3 per share.

news.title:
Eight stocks, including Adani Power, Cochin Shipyard, and Hyundai Motor India, enter the F&O segment starting April 1.
HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Technologies, and Torrent Power exit F&O post this series; stock lot sizes vary by company.

news.title:
Crisil assigns 'AA Stable' rating to Adani Power's ₹12,000 Cr term loan facilities.
Existing bank facilities & proposed NCDs of ₹57,000 Cr reaffirmed 'AA Stable' rating.
news.summary:
Crisil assigns 'AA Stable' rating to Adani Power's ₹12,000 Cr term loan facilities.
Existing bank facilities & proposed NCDs of ₹57,000 Cr reaffirmed 'AA Stable' rating.

news.title:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.
news.summary:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.

news.title:
Adani Power's supply to Gujarat fell 15% in 2025 amid rising demand.
Adani Power supplied 13,203 MUs in 2025, down from 15,491 MUs in 2024.
news.summary:
Adani Power's supply to Gujarat fell 15% in 2025 amid rising demand.
Adani Power supplied 13,203 MUs in 2025, down from 15,491 MUs in 2024.

news.title:
BTL EPC secures a ₹590Cr order from Adani Power for CHP & AHP systems in Bihar.
The project involves design, engineering, supply, and commissioning for a 3,800MW thermal plant.
news.summary:
BTL EPC secures a ₹590Cr order from Adani Power for CHP & AHP systems in Bihar.
The project involves design, engineering, supply, and commissioning for a 3,800MW thermal plant.

news.title:
SC rejects UPJVNL's appeal against Essar Power MP's insolvency resolution; Adani Power emerged as successful bidder.
NCLT, NCLAT upheld claims classification; operational creditors, including UPJVNL, received no payment under the resolution plan.
news.summary:
SC rejects UPJVNL's appeal against Essar Power MP's insolvency resolution; Adani Power emerged as successful bidder.
NCLT, NCLAT upheld claims classification; operational creditors, including UPJVNL, received no payment under the resolution plan.

news.title:
Adani Power shares fell 2.5% intraday to Rs 151, breaking a 2-day rally.
The stock had gained over 7% during the preceding two-day rally on exchanges.
news.summary:
Adani Power shares fell 2.5% intraday to Rs 151, breaking a 2-day rally.
The stock had gained over 7% during the preceding two-day rally on exchanges.

news.title:
Nifty Energy fell 1.25%, losing 451 points as crude surged to $101.25/barrel.
Adani Power gained 3.98% while Adani Total Gas dropped 5.27%; inflation risks loom.
news.summary:
